description: Fictional benchmark prompts for local Ollama model testing.

prompts.title: Short factual answer
prompts.prompt: Answer in one short paragraph: What is the difference between a checklist and a test plan?

prompts.title: Fictional project summary
prompts.prompt: Summarize the following fictional project note into 4 bullet points. Note: The Demo Archive team tested a local search prototype with 120 synthetic documents. The prototype found titles quickly but sometimes missed date filters. The team wants a small follow-up test before replacing the old tool. No customer data was used.

prompts.title: Structured JSON output
prompts.prompt: Return valid JSON only. Extract fields from this fictional task: Project Alpha needs a local-only model test by Friday. Owner is Demo User. Risk is unstable JSON output. Required keys: project, owner, due, risk.

prompts.title: Workflow recommendation
prompts.prompt: You are helping evaluate a local model for a fictional note-cleanup workflow. Give a concise recommendation with sections: Decision, Reason, Risk, Next Step.

prompts.title: No-think leakage check
prompts.prompt: Answer with the final answer only, no reasoning trace: Should a model be promoted after one benchmark run?
